summary: Added durable release manifest verification for DinoBrain OS: release_manifest_status artifact, ZIP/SHA/tag/app-data commit parity checks, health/freshness/Observatory/verify:goal wiring, v2.2.2 package/tag alignment, and regenerated local release ZIP/SHA with SkipUpload.
decisions: Release readiness now requires a durable release_manifest_status artifact with package version, expected tag, app/data commits, ZIP path, and SHA parity.
App tracked dirty and tag/artifact drift remain blockers; generated data-vault dirty state is recorded as a warning to avoid self-referential refresh failures.
Bumped release package version to v2.2.2, pushed app main, force-updated v2.2.2 tag to current app HEAD, and regenerated local release ZIP/SHA with SkipUpload because no GitHub token is available.
next_steps: Fresh Codex Desktop live pre-response proof remains the only verify:goal blocker: restart or fresh-thread Codex, run live proof, and rerun verify:goal.
When a GitHub token is available, upload the v2.2.2 ZIP/SHA release assets and extend release_manifest_status with authenticated GitHub asset evidence.
Continue remaining review-backlog and compounding-lifecycle hard gates.
